action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 20 achieved a new best mean_r2=0.5330 using a 5-model Ridge-weighted ensemble (best.pt, resmlp.pt, model_c.pt, model_d.pt, model_e.pt). The training run for model_e took ~29 minutes. Remaining budget is only ~11.8 minutes and 10 iterations. Analysis: Time is now the binding constraint—insufficient for another full training run. Marginal tweaks to ensemble regularization might yield tiny gains but risk timeout; the current ensemble is stable and represents the best validated configuration. Decision: Conclude the experiment while the best score is secured.
action.done_reason: Achieved best mean_r2 of 0.5330 with a 5-model Ridge ensemble. Remaining time (~12 min) is insufficient for additional training, and further ensemble tuning offers diminishing returns. Ending experiment to preserve the validated best submission.
